chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：下一个杀手级AI产品，会出现在哪个赛道？| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
下一个杀手级AI产品，是眼镜、是Agent，还是某个尚未命名的“物理世界入口”？这场圆桌没有标准答案，却达成一个共识：单纯套壳大模型的应用注定短命，只有长期在线、连接物理世界、能完成真实交互闭环的产品，才可能成为下一个百亿级赛道。从AI眼镜到具身智能，入口之争已悄然打响。

硬件先行还是生态为王？C端规模还是B端付费？最终指向同一个逻辑：纯套壳应用、弱交互硬件注定被淘汰，只有“多模态底座+AI原生智能体+可穿戴硬件”三位一体，才能让AI从聊天框真正走进现实。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

<

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：当AI进入产业前线：未来最稀缺的AI人才，会是谁？| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
稀缺的，到底是懂AI的人，还是懂业务的人？

一个反直觉的判断——懂AI这件事正在快速贬值，而能在关键低频决策中做出判断的人，才是未来的稀缺品。高频重复的工作最容易被AI替代，但在打造爆品、建立品牌等低频高影响力的决策上，人的判断依然不可替代，企业AI转型的最大卡点也不是技术或数据，而是“想不到应用场景”， 当前AI的利润大头仍在基础设施层，应用端的ROI尚未完全释放，但拐点会比预想来得更快。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

郑王宇丨36氪基金投资副总裁（主持）

龚毅丨

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：人才特种兵：“AI原生人才”与“产业老炮”的共生手册| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
真正AI原生的人，甚至不会来这个现场。但对于那些积极转型的20%，如何找到、培养并留住他们，这里有一本实战手册。

只有1%的企业是AI原生企业，20%积极拥抱变化，80%在苦苦挣扎；人才亦然。圆桌深入探讨了企业“赶时髦招AI人才”的焦虑、通过黑客松内部挖掘AI人才的方法、以及“事业留人、文化留人”的留存策略。

帮主丨36氪《AI局内人》主播（主持）

郑鹏宇丨杭州颜柯教育科技有限公司创始人

chinese_news.title: 对话王小川：离开通用人工智能的主干道之后
chinese_news.summary:
“如果没有转型，继续走主流道路，你也会有同等程度的焦虑。”王小川说，这次转型，让他真正回归到从创业第一天就最想做的事情：造AI医生。

访谈｜邓咏仪 杨轩

文｜邓咏仪

一年前，王小川带着百川智能来了一次激烈的“大刹车”：大幅缩减通用模型团队，关闭金融等多条行业线，All in医疗大模型。但与此同时，整个大模型行业却热闹非凡，大厂和创业公司轮番进行“轰炸

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：AI浓度与转化率：数字体验的实战增长法则
chinese_news.summary:
AI浓度并非越高越好，转化率的秘密在于人机共生的平衡点。

“AI应像手机一样贯穿全流程”，而面对亲子游客和老年群体，主动将AI浓度降至50%，却实现了超50%的转化率。浓度的关键是以人为本、文化温度先行。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

杨晟丨珀乐互动科技创始人

薛冰：各位嘉宾大家下午好，我是主持人薛冰，很荣幸受到36氪

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 北大项目孵化，国内首家原生机器人“大脑芯片”企业获数亿元融资
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，北京维泛智能科技有限公司（以下简称“维泛智能”）近日完成数亿元种子轮融资，由中关村资本及旗下启航投资联合领投，上海未来产业基金、石溪资本、佰维存储、燕创集团、海益投资、探元创投共同投资。

维泛智能成立于2025年5月，孵化自北京大学类脑芯片实验室（PAICORE Lab），专注于具身智能“大小脑”融合芯片研发，致力于打造全国产化机器人核心计算方案。

联合创始人殷积磊毕业于北京大学，拥有超过20年半导体行业经验，曾任知存科技COO兼研发副总裁，以及IBM、GlobalFoundries芯片研发总监，并曾在MTK、VIA等企业从事芯片研发工作。团队核心成员均来自IBM、华为、腾讯等行业头部企业。

随着具身智能快速发展，机器人“大脑”算法持续演进，对通用芯片平台提出了更高要求。机器人“大脑”芯片不仅需要承载多模态感知与AI推理，还需要兼顾运动控制等核心计算任务，是机器人完成交互、决策与执行的“中枢神经”。

chinese_news.title: 用AI来管公司，Moka推出三款AI HR工具｜涌现新栏目
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜梁键强

编辑｜王毓婵

一句话介绍

Moka为AI人力资源软件服务商，早期从智能化招聘管理系统起步，后逐步扩展至更完整的HR管理系统。5月，Moka上线了招聘Eva、人事Eva和BPEva三款AI HR产品。

招聘Eva覆盖招聘全流程，辅助企业完成识人、筛选和面试；人事Eva聚焦报表处理、流程流转和员工咨询等重复事务；BPEva则用于动态更新人才画像，辅助企业进行人才识别和组织决策。

支撑这三款产品的是Moka AI工坊，它相当于底层能力平台，可以让企业用业务语言描述需求，具有快速响应、个性化定制和安全上线等能力。

chinese_news.title: 千禧年流行的老式漂亮饭，居然翻红了
chinese_news.summary:
过去这几年，餐饮行业的新店越开越多，淘汰速度也越来越快。精致餐饮仍在发展，但人们愿意为摆盘和氛围买单的冲动在减弱，转而开始寻求一种体面而高性价比的社交空间。

在这样的节奏中，上岛咖啡、米萝咖啡、老树咖啡、良木缘、绿茵阁、豪享来等颇具年代感的老式咖啡餐吧，又开始悄悄爬上了年轻人的打卡清单。

二三十年前，它们是城市里最洋气的餐厅，菜单上写着影视剧男女主角才会点的黑椒牛排意面和卡布奇诺咖啡。隔壁桌是商务人士谈生意，或是时髦情侣在约会，小朋友则眼巴巴地等着大人给自己点上一碗香蕉船。

investment_theses.thesis: US travel and discretionary spending inflection is underpriced; long airline consolidation plays (e.g., XLU, DAL via Berkshire) and short low-cost carrier capacity into summer 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Spirit's collapse, high fuel prices test summer vacation limits
CNBC: Americans feeling inflation's pinch on travel/recreation/food
CNBC: Berkshire added Delta; Delta benefits from Spirit capacity exit
CNBC: Millennials cutting entertainment spend, going on fewer dates
investment_theses.counter_view: Recession fears could slash travel demand faster than airline capacity contracts; fuel prices could spike further, offsetting margin benefits from consolidation.
investment_theses.expression: Long XLU (Utilities ETF as proxy for airline consolidation beneficiary) or direct DAL call spreads; short airline index (if available) or IYG (iShares Transportation) outperforming SPY

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin spot ETF outflows ($2.26B in two weeks, BTC at $74.3k) are a contrarian buy signal; institutions are capitulating into oversold conditions before rate-cut cycle; long BTC via spot or quarterly perps vs. short USD.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: $2.26B Bitcoin spot ETF outflows in two weeks
Santiment: $1.26B Bitcoin ETF outflows spark contrarian buy signal
CNBC: Americans feeling inflation pinch; summer spending will stress Fed to cut
Michael Saylor hints at potential 2026 MicroStrategy BTC sales (implies top-of-cycle risk, but timing uncertain)
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed could hold rates at 4.5% through 2026 if inflation proves stickier; MicroStrategy selling could trigger panic liquidation; geopolitical shock (Ukraine, Iran, China) could demand flight-to-safety in USD.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC/USD spot (1-3 month horizon) or BTC December 2026 quarterly perps on Binance/FTX; hedge with short DXY (US Dollar Index) if macro backdrop clarifies

investment_theses.thesis: Chinese AI hardware/robotics (embodied AI, robot 'brain chips') is entering VC funding crescendo; 36Kr reports fluent AI + physical-world interaction as killer app; long semiconductor/AI chip exposure in Asia (e.g., ASML, SMIC exposure, NVIDIA Asia revenue).
supporting_signals: 36Kr: Vipan (维泛智能) raises ~$100M seed round for robot brain chips (incubated from Peking University)
36Kr AI+Industry Conference consensus: only long-term online, physical-world-connecting AI products survive; embodied AI/glasses/agents narrative gaining steam
36Kr on Moka HR SaaS: AI automation in SME operations accelerating
Microsoft canceling Claude Code licenses signals AI productivity software consolidation; raises demand for underlying hardware
investment_theses.counter_view: China-US tech war could impose export controls on ASML, chip design; capex cycles are lumpy and speculative; most 36Kr-covered startups fail to scale.

investment_theses.thesis: Euro stablecoin regulatory framework delayed by ECB concern, but geopolitical energy scarcity (Rubio in India selling US energy) forces Europe's hand; long EUR, short USD medium-term as EU must launch competitive CBDC/stablecoin by Q4 2026 to counter US financial hegemony.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: ECB pushes back on euro stablecoin proposals, citing stability risks
BBC: Rubio (US SecState) in India pushing US energy to offset Iran war shortfalls (implies US gaining geopolitical leverage via energy/fintech)
36Kr/CoinDesk: Clarity Act (crypto-friendly US legislation) momentum accelerating; Minnesota banking crypto push shows US regulatory advantage
Microsoft-Claude cancellation suggests US AI/fintech consolidation risk; EU must respond with digital currency framework
investment_theses.counter_view: ECB may delay stablecoin decision another 12+ months; EU banking cartel opposes stablecoin to protect deposit monopoly; energy crisis resolves, removing urgency.
investment_theses.expression: Long EUR/USD (or short DXY via 6M forward, 2026 expiry) on thesis EU accelerates regulatory clarity; hedge with long BTC/EUR if stablecoin narrative strengthens (indicates institutional demand)

investment_theses.thesis: Sec approval of Nasdaq BTC index options May 5, 2026 opens institutional derivatives hedging channel; retail underprices structural shift from spot ETF to derivatives; long BTC volatility (VIX-equivalent proxy) and short spot ETF flows into summer 2026.

CoinDesk: Clarity Act, yield-as-a-service narrative gaining; Minnesota local banking crypto push removes friction
CoinDesk: Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova leaving (revenue slowdown suggests retail saturation; institutional derivatives are next growth vector)
Bitcoin spot ETF outflows show retail capitulation; institutions will use index options for leverage/hedging rather than spot accumulation
investment_theses.counter_view: Index options volume could flatline if macro uncertainty prevents hedging demand; Clarity Act delayed, regulatory ambiguity chokes institutional adoption; retail spot ETF demand resurges, cannibalizing derivatives volume.
investment_theses.expression: Long 1-3 month BTC call/put spreads on Nasdaq (if retail-accessible via brokers); or synthetic long BTC gamma via perp funding-rate arbitrage if spot options unavailable; short spot ETF holdings (via IBIT/FBTC short or DCA-short thesis)
